entity.summary: Neoxa-team-operated multichain trading venue offering spot markets, AMM liquidity pools, asset swaps, and a wNEOX bridge, with custody and manual withdrawal-review features on the current service surface.
entity.notes: The Neoxa ecosystem labels the current venue as an official team product and as a DEX, while the service itself describes registered traders, cold storage, and manual withdrawal review. HEI therefore models it as a centralized exchange-like venue and keeps status limited because independent trading-volume verification is weak. It is not merged with the separate native Neoxa DEX planned for Q3 2026.

evidence.title: Neoxa Exchange official trading platform
evidence.notes: Current first-party service presents multichain spot markets, AMM liquidity pools, swaps, a wNEOX bridge, an exchange token, registered-trader statistics, cold storage, and manual withdrawal review.

evidence.title: Neoxa ecosystem product overview
evidence.notes: The official chain ecosystem page identifies Neoxa Exchange as a current team-operated trading platform for spot pairs and the wNEOX bridge, while separately preserving the planned native Neoxa DEX as a future product.
